system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.

{"procName":"dbo.mes_dinhmuc_govan_phathanh","body":"CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MES_DINHMUC_GOVAN_PHATHANH]
(
  @masp_nhamay nvarchar(50),
  @masp_mausac nvarchar(MAX)
)
AS
--DISABLE TRIGGER ALL ON tr_dinhmuc_govan;
--DECLARE @masp_nhamay   NVARCHAR (50) = '9D-NH-H5-BH'
--DECLARE @masp_mausac   NVARCHAR (MAX) = 'TJO001'

/*** LẤY TẤT CẢ CÁC SẢN PHẨM ***/
SELECT masp, mausac
INTO #DS_SANPHAM
FROM tr_sanpham
WHERE     masp_nhamay = @masp_nhamay
      AND mausac IN
             (SELECT LTRIM (RTRIM ([value]))
              FROM fn_Split (@masp_mausac, ','))

/*** TẠO BẢNG TẠM ĐỂ LƯU ĐỊNH MỨC MỚI THEO SẢN PHẨM ***/
DECLARE @DINHMUC_GOVAN TABLE
(
   masp          NVARCHAR (200),
   mact          NVARCHAR (200),
   stt           NVARCHAR (50),
   chitiet       NVARCHAR (MAX),
   id_nguyenlieu NVARCHAR (50),
   nguyenlieu    NVARCHAR (50),
   dayy_tc       FLOAT,
   rong_tc       FLOAT,
   dai_tc        FLOAT,
   soluong_tc    INT,
   m3_tc         FLOAT,
   dayy_sc       FLOAT,
   rong_sc       FLOAT,
   dai_sc        FLOAT,
   soluong_sc    INT,
   m3_sc         FLOAT,
   ghichu        NVARCHAR (MAX),
   hoanthanh     BIT,
   ngaytao       DATETIME,
   nguoitao      NVARCHAR (50),
   nguoisua      NVARCHAR (50),
   ngaysua       DATETIME,
   fsc_id        INT,
   uv_code       nvarchar(50),
   uv_matchinh1 int, 
   uv_matphu1 int, 
   uv_canhdai1 int, 
   uv_canhngan1 int,
   phoi_tructiep bit
)


/*** LƯU ĐỊNH MỨC THEO SẢN PHẨM VÀO BẢNG TẠM ***/
DECLARE @masp   NVARCHAR (200)
DECLARE @mausac   NVARCHAR (50)

DECLARE cur CURSOR LOCAL FOR SELECT masp, mausac FROM #DS_SANPHAM

OPEN cur
FETCH NEXT FROM cur   INTO @masp, @mausac

WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
   INSERT INTO @DINHMUC_GOVAN (masp,
                               mact,
                               stt,
                               chitiet,
							   id_nguyenlieu,
                               nguyenlieu,
                               dayy_tc,
                               rong_tc,
                               dai_tc,
                               soluong_tc,
                               m3_tc,
                               dayy_sc,
                               rong_sc,
                               dai_sc,
                               soluong_sc,
                               m3_sc,
                               ghichu,
                               hoanthanh,
                               ngaytao,
                               nguoitao,
                               ngaysua,
                               nguoisua, fsc_id, 
							   uv_code, uv_matchinh1, uv_matphu1, uv_canhdai1, uv_canhngan1, phoi_tructiep)
      SELECT @masp,
             mact,
             stt,
             chitiet,
			 id_nguyenlieu,
             nguyenlieu,
             dayy_tc,
             rong_tc,
             dai_tc,
             soluong_tc,
             m3_tc,
             dayy_sc,
             rong_sc,
             dai_sc,
             soluong_sc,
             m3_sc,
             ghichu,
             1,
             ngaytao,
             nguoitao,
             ngaysua,
             nguoisua, fsc_id, 
			 uv_code, uv_matchinh1, uv_matphu1, uv_canhdai1, uv_canhngan1, phoi_tructiep
      FROM mes_dinhmuc_govan
      WHERE masp = @masp_nhamay

   FETCH NEXT FROM cur   INTO @masp, @mausac
END

CLOSE cur
DEALLOCATE cur

DELETE tr_dinhmuc_govan
WHERE masp IN (SELECT masp FROM #DS_SANPHAM)

INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_govan 
(
	masp, mact, stt, chitiet, id_nguyenlieu, nguyenlieu,
	dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc, soluong_tc, m3_tc,
	dayy_sc, rong_sc, dai_sc, soluong_sc, m3_sc,
	ghichu, hoanthanh,
	ngaytao, nguoitao, nguoisua, ngaysua, fsc_id, uv_code,
	uv_matchinh1, uv_matphu1, uv_canhdai1, uv_canhngan1, phoi_tructiep
)
SELECT masp, mact, stt, chitiet, id_nguyenlieu, nguyenlieu,
	dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc, soluong_tc, m3_tc,
	dayy_sc, rong_sc, dai_sc, soluong_sc, m3_sc,
	ghichu, hoanthanh,
	ngaytao, nguoitao, ngaysua, nguoisua, fsc_id, uv_code,
	uv_matchinh1, uv_matphu1, uv_canhdai1, uv_canhngan1, phoi_tructiep
FROM @DINHMUC_GOVAN


/*** SỬ DỤNG MERGE ĐỂ PHÁT HÀNH ĐỊNH MỨC ***/

--WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET
